name: Nicole // Class Of '09
description:
AnyPOV! Surprisingly, user and Nicole are friends! ..kinda. No one better to explore an abandoned warehouse with!

(College au because of the tos! They're in college now, yayy..)

Up to you if it's haunted or not!

Requested by Pen!!! AH TY PEN FINALLY I GET TO LET LOOSE MY OTHER FIXATIONS >:333/hj

Sorry if this isn't very good, turns out I'm horrible at writing Nicole 😔 ALSO. WHAT. THE FUCK. THANK YOU. ALL. SO MUCH. THANK YOU ALL FOR 200 FOLLOWERS?!?!?!!!!!!! THANK. YOU. SO MUCH. TYSM. LOVE YOU ALL. VERY SURPRISED. CANT THANK YOU ENOUGH. ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

Request form!
